tax.title: Tax Rules
tax.vatRateDesc: Default rate for OCR recognition and financial forecasts
tax.autoAuthDesc: Automatically sync to tax system for certification after upload
tax.adminExpenseDesc: Used for P&L net profit calculation (office, labor, depreciation, etc.)
tax.hint: Note: Tax surcharge is auto-calculated at 12% of VAT; income tax at 25% of gross profit

security.title: Account & Security
security.passwordDesc: Change your password regularly to keep your account secure
security.encryptionDesc: All data transmission is encrypted via HTTPS. Session cookies use HttpOnly + Secure + SameSite protection.
security.errorAllFields: Please fill in all password fields
security.errorMinLength: New password must be at least 6 characters
security.errorNetwork: Network error, please try again later

language.title: Interface Language
language.subtitle: Changes apply immediately, no restart needed
language.note: Translations are being improved. Please report any inaccuracies.
language.scopeNo: Does NOT change tax rules, currency, report structure, or accounting categories. Those are controlled by Accounting Standard.

accounting.title: Accounting Standard
accounting.subtitle: Select your country/region's accounting standard to set default tax rates, currency, and reporting format
accounting.warning: Switching accounting standard only updates default tax rates and currency. Existing data will not be recalculated.
accounting.scopeYes1: Tax regime, tax rates, and tax concepts
accounting.scopeYes3: Dashboard metrics, accounting categories, and AI finance context
accounting.scopeNo: Does NOT change the display language. Menus and labels stay in your chosen UI Language.

categories.title: Accounting Categories
categories.subtitle: Pre-defined categories for the current accounting standard. You can add custom categories; system categories cannot be deleted.
categories.label: Name
categories.empty: No categories of this type for this accounting standard
categories.systemNote: System categories are maintained by SoloLedger and mapped to official report lines. They cannot be deleted but can be renamed. Custom categories are fully under your control.

ai.title: AI Providers · BYOK
ai.subtitle: Configure multiple providers and switch defaults. API Keys are encrypted via system Keychain.
ai.currentModelId: Current model ID sent to API
ai.modelOnly: Update model ID only (keep existing Key)
ai.testOk: Model callable, Key and ID both verified
ai.staleModelHint: Currently using a custom or legacy model ID — reset recommended.

security.title: About API Key Security
security.item1: All API Keys are encrypted via Electron safeStorage into local SQLite; the renderer never sees plaintext
security.item2: SoloLedger never uploads your Key. AI requests go directly from your device to the provider.
security.item3: Deleting a Key immediately disables that provider. Existing business data is preserved.

dataBackup.title: Data Backup
dataBackup.subtitle: Back up or restore your local ledger database (local SQLite, desktop only).
dataBackup.backupHint: Export the current ledger database to a .db file. Keep it safe to restore anytime.
dataBackup.restoreHint: Restore ledger data from a previously exported .db backup file.
dataBackup.restoreWarning: Restoring overwrites your current local data with the selected backup and requires an app restart. The current database is automatically backed up first. Continue?
dataBackup.restoreSuccess: Restore complete. Your previous data was automatically backed up to: {{path}}
dataBackup.restartRequired: The app must restart to load the restored data.
dataBackup.invalidFile: The selected file is not a valid SoloLedger database.
dataBackup.newerVersion: This backup is from a newer app version and may be incompatible. Restore was cancelled.
dataBackup.autoBackupFailed: Failed to auto-back up the current database. Restore was cancelled to protect your data.
dataBackup.desktopOnly: Data backup is available in the desktop app only.
dataBackup.devModeRestart: Development mode: please close the app manually and run npm run electron:dev again.

dataMigration.title: Data Migration
dataMigration.subtitle: Migrate legacy sales/purchases data to the new transactions table (i18n data model). Old tables are preserved; rollback available for 30 days.
dataMigration.noLegacy: No legacy sales/purchases tables in this database — nothing to migrate.
dataMigration.rollbackConfirm: Confirm rollback? This will delete {{count}} migrated transactions. Original sales/purchases data is preserved.
dataMigration.note1: sales → income / purchases → expense; defaults to the current locale's first income / COGS category
dataMigration.note2: Legacy tables are NOT deleted — rollback anytime
dataMigration.note3: Migration records stored in legacy_migrations table to prevent duplicate runs
dataMigration.note4: Legacy fields (quantity / unit price / shipping) saved to source_meta JSON — no data loss

onboarding.welcomeDescription: SoloLedger is a smart ledger app built for one-person companies, sole proprietors, and solo SaaS founders. All data stays on your device, AI is powered by your own API Key — we never see your data.
onboarding.feature1: Local SQLite storage — all data lives on your Mac
onboarding.feature2: Claude · ChatGPT · Gemini supported; configure multiple, switch defaults
onboarding.feature3: API Keys encrypted by system Keychain, never leave your device
onboarding.feature4: Invoice OCR, business analysis, smart alerts, receivables/payables
onboarding.providerSubtitle: At least one provider is required to get started. You can switch defaults in settings later.
onboarding.companySubtitle: Used as context for AI analysis. Editable anytime in settings.
onboarding.skipCompany: Skip for now; fill in settings later
onboarding.localeDesc: These are independent settings. UI language controls menus and labels. Accounting standard controls tax rules, currency, and reports.
onboarding.brandTagline: SoloLedger · smart ledger for one-person companies
onboarding.loadFailedTitle: Failed to load AI provider configuration
onboarding.loadFailedHint: If you just upgraded SoloLedger, fully quit the app (Cmd+Q) and restart.
onboarding.providersEmpty: The provider list is empty. Fully quit SoloLedger (Cmd+Q) and restart.

chat.title: AI Assistant
chat.welcomeDesc: I can provide real-time business analysis and recommendations. Ask a question or use the shortcuts below.
chat.emptyReply: Could not get a valid reply.
chat.notInvoice: This file does not appear to be an invoice or receipt (detected: {{type}}). Please verify.
chat.invoiceRecognizeFailed: Recognition failed. Please upload a clear invoice image and retry.
chat.quickPromptUploadInvoice: I want to upload an invoice to record it
chat.quickPromptFinanceQuery: Show me the latest financial report summary
chat.quickPromptTrend: Analyze business trends over the past few months
chat.quickPromptMarket: Search latest market prices and trends

dashboard.netMarginNote: Net margin reflects profitability after operating costs
dashboard.taxSummaryNote1: Tax-inclusive amounts are used for supplier/customer reconciliation
dashboard.taxSummaryNote2: Core financial decisions should be based on tax-exclusive amounts

sales.inventoryWarning: Low inventory — sales will cause negative stock

invoices.tableSubtitle: Reconcile invoice flow vs. logistics (Inventory vs Invoices)

analysis.matrixSubtitle: Integrated clustering analysis of amount, volume & macro indices
analysis.anomalyLow: Very low per-unit revenue volatility. Pricing strategy is stable.
analysis.anomalyMid: Moderate per-unit revenue volatility. Monitor price changes.
analysis.anomalyHigh: High per-unit revenue volatility. Investigate anomalous months.
analysis.forecastSubtitle: Trend forecast model based on historical data
analysis.forecastAnalyzing: Integrating business metrics for regression analysis...
analysis.aiError: Cannot connect to forecast engine. Check network or API config.
analysis.insufficientHistory: Not enough history to compute MoM / YoY
analysis.forecastIdle: Click the button below to generate the AI business forecast
analysis.forecastPromptIntro: You are a seasoned business operations analyst. Based on all the information sources below, provide a revenue and profit forecast for the next 3 months.
analysis.forecastPromptHistoryLegend: Fields: m=month, r=revenue, c=cost, p=gross profit, np=net profit, pt=purchase quantity, st=sales quantity, yoy=YoY%, mom=MoM%, d=deflator
analysis.forecastPromptFeaturesLegend: Notes: ma3=3-month moving average, trendSlope=trend slope (monthly increment), revenuePerTon=revenue per unit, costRatio=cost-to-revenue ratio, seasonalIndices=seasonal indices, avgAcceleration=growth acceleration
analysis.forecastPromptVarLegend: Notes: a purely statistical forecast fitted with AR(1) across the three series revenue/cost/sales quantity.
analysis.forecastPromptMcTitle: ## 5. Monte Carlo simulation, 90% confidence interval (1000 runs, P5-P95)
analysis.forecastPromptMcLegend: Notes: a random simulation interval based on historical volatility; uncertainty grows with the forecast horizon.
analysis.forecastPromptRequirements:
## Analysis requirements
1. If you have web-search capability, look up the latest relevant industry market conditions and macroeconomic indicators.
2. Combine all of the above (business data + statistical models + Monte Carlo interval) to produce a rigorous forecast.
3. If the trend model's forecast disagrees with your own judgment, explain why and your basis for adjustment in insights.
4. In insights, summarize which data sources you referenced and the main risk factors.

finance.pdfDesktopOnly: PDF export is available in the desktop app only.
finance.pdfFailed: PDF export failed. Please try again.
finance.cashflowSubtitle: There is not enough cash flow data in this ledger yet. Add purchases, sales, or income and expense records to view cash flow analysis.
finance.cashflowDesc: There is not enough cash flow data in this ledger yet. Add purchases, sales, or income and expense records to view cash flow analysis.

aiInsights.title: AI Brief
aiInsights.error: AI analysis failed. Check network or API config and retry.
aiInsights.quotaExceeded: Gemini quota reached. Switch AI provider or try again later.
aiInsights.quotaSwitchHint: {{providers}} available — switch in Settings → AI Providers.
aiInsights.empty: No analysis data. Click refresh to generate.

aiError.noProvider: No AI provider configured. Add an API key under Settings → AI Providers.
aiError.auth: The API key is invalid or expired. Check and update it under Settings → AI Providers.
aiError.permission: No access to this model. You may need to enable it or get allow-listed in the provider console.
aiError.quota: Rate limit reached or quota exhausted. Retry later, or switch AI provider.
aiError.modelNotFound: The model ID does not exist or is unavailable. Set an available model ID under Settings → AI Providers.
aiError.badRequest: Invalid request. Common causes: a misspelled model ID or an unsupported feature.
aiError.serverError: The AI provider's service is having issues. Please retry later.
aiError.parseFailed: Failed to parse the AI response. Please retry; if it persists, switch model or provider.
aiError.network: Cannot reach the AI provider. Check your network or proxy settings.
aiError.timeout: The AI request timed out. Please retry later.
aiError.unknown: The AI request failed. Please retry later.

ocr.errorUnsupportedFormat: Unsupported file. Please upload a JPG / PNG / WebP image or a PDF.
ocr.errorImageTooLarge: Image too large (max 8MB). Please compress it and try again.
ocr.errorPdfRender: Could not read the PDF. Make sure the file isn't corrupted and try again.
ocr.noProviderConfigured: The current AI service doesn't support OCR. Configure an OCR-capable provider (e.g. Qwen / Gemini) under Settings → AI Providers.
ocr.previewHint: Review the recognized fields, then click "Use these values" to fill the form — you still save manually.

ai.analyzeSystemPrompt:
You are a professional business analyst. Analyze the following business data and provide:
1. summary: A brief executive summary
2. topInsights: 3-5 key insights (array)
3. recommendations: 3-5 improvement suggestions (array)
4. anomalies: List of anomalous indicators (array)
Return strictly in JSON format.
ai.ocrPrompt:
You are a professional document data extraction assistant. Extract the following information from this invoice image, return strictly in JSON format (no markdown code blocks):
{
  "date": "Invoice date YYYY-MM-DD",
  "customer": "Customer / buyer name",
  "quantity": "Total quantity with unit",
  "price": total amount excluding tax (number),
  "shipping": shipping cost (number),
  "invoiceNo": "Invoice number",
  "totalWithTax": total amount including tax (number),
  "unitPriceWithoutTax": unit price excluding tax (number),
  "taxAmount": total tax amount (number)
}
Numeric fields must be numbers not strings. Use 0 if not found.
ai.chatSystemPrompt:
You are a professional business data assistant with access to all real-time business data.

Your responsibilities:
1. Answer questions about internal operations using the complete data
2. Perform cross-module analysis
3. Proactively correlate data from multiple modules for comprehensive insights

IMPORTANT: Strictly follow the accounting locale below for business and financial analysis (management basis) (currency, tax regime, report structure, accounting categories), and respond in the UI language below. Do NOT infer accounting locale from UI language, and do NOT infer UI language from accounting locale.

Formatting: Use **bold** only (not ***). Use clear lists and paragraphs.
ai.contextFallback: Business summary: annual revenue {{revenue}}, gross margin {{grossMargin}}%, net margin {{netMargin}}%.
ai.forecastSystemPrompt: You are a seasoned business operations analyst. Combine the historical data and statistical model results to provide a management-level forecast (internal reference, not statutory financial/tax conclusions). Return JSON with an insights string and predictions array.
ai.boundaryDirective: Boundary: provide only management-level estimates and suggestions; do not state statutory tax or accounting conclusions. When tax filing, returns, or compliance arise, state that figures are estimates and advise consulting a qualified accountant/tax professional.

usTax.title: US Tax Tools
usTax.notApplicable: The current accounting locale is not US. US Tax Tools is only available when accountingLocale = US. Please switch to the US accounting standard in Settings to use it.
usTax.mileageNote: IRS standard mileage rate: ${{rate}}/mile ({{year}}). Deduction auto-calculated and maps to Schedule C Line 9 (Car & Truck Expenses).
usTax.homeOfficeNote: Simplified method: max $1,500 (300 sqft × $5). Actual method requires tracking actual expenses and prorating by area. Maps to Schedule C Line 30 / Form 8829.

transactions.empty: No transactions yet. Click "New Transaction" to add one.

products.subtitle: Manage products and service items and their units. Service items are excluded from inventory.
products.name: Name
products.empty: No products or services yet. Click below to add one.

documents.title: Business Documents
documents.subtitle: Create and manage quotations, sales orders and other internal business documents (not tax invoices)
documents.desktopOnly: Business documents are available in the desktop app only
documents.voidConfirm: Void this document? It can no longer be edited.
documents.loadFailed: Failed to load, please try again
documents.itemsRequired: Please add at least one line item
documents.pdfDesktopOnly: PDF export is available in the desktop app only.
documents.pdfFailed: PDF export failed. Please try again.
documents.pdfDisclaimer: This is an internal business document, not an official tax invoice.
documents.generatedOk: Business document created — see the Business Documents page
documents.stmtNoRecords: No sales records for this customer in the period
documents.stmtNeedInput: Select a customer and period first
documents.taxInvoiceNumberHint: Manually enter the externally issued invoice number; never auto-generated
documents.attachmentMissing: Attachment file not found; it may have been moved or deleted
documents.attachmentNotBackedUp: Note: attachments are not included in database backups; back up the attachments folder separately
documents.taxInvoiceCompliance: This feature only records an externally issued official tax invoice; it does not issue invoices
documents.taxInvoiceVoidReadOnly: Invoice link info is read-only for voided documents
documents.attachmentInvalidType: Only PDF / JPG / PNG files are supported

disclaimer.report: This view is a management estimate generated from your data using simplified rules. It is not a statutory financial statement — rely on a qualified accountant and official figures for tax filing and external reporting.
disclaimer.tax: Estimate for management reference only — not a basis for tax filing.
disclaimer.ai: AI conclusions are estimates from your data, may be inaccurate, and are not professional tax or accounting advice.
disclaimer.usTax: Estimates only — not for tax filing. Consult a tax professional.
disclaimer.rates: Tax rates are preset reference values and may change — verify against current official rates.
